title: Crispy Fish Fry
description: A simple yet delicious fish fry recipe with a crunchy coating.

ingredients.name: fry
ingredients.notes: beef or vegetable oil for frying

instructions: 1. Rinse the fish fillets and pat them dry with paper towels.
2. In a shallow dish, mix together the flour, mustard powder, and a pinch of salt.
3. Dredge the fish fillets in the flour mixture, coating them evenly.
4. Dip the floured fish fillets in the beaten eggs.
5. Roll the egg-coated fish fillets in the panko breadcrumbs to coat.
6. Heat about 1/2-inch of oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
7. Add the coated fish fillets to the hot oil and fry for about 3-4 minutes per side.
8. Remove the fried fish from the oil and place it on a paper towel-lined plate to drain excess oil.
9. Serve the crispy fish fry hot and enjoy!
